chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1723 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 7619/19 3.For hearing of main case 06-11-2025 None present for the petitioners. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant A.G. ***** None is present for the petitioners, nor has any intimation been received so far. Record reflects that this petition was filed in the year 2019 and was first fixed in Court on 05.12.2019, when notices were ordered to be issued. Thereafter, no steps were taken by the petitioners to have the matter fixed in Court, which shows that the petitioners and their counsel have lost interest in proceeding with this matter, or that the purpose for which the instant petition was filed has already been achieved. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
